title: Re-enable existing, and add new rpm .spec CI tests
body:
Rework rpm .spec version check slightly and re-enable it
Add check for rpm changelog most recent entry version
Fix minor variable issue in rpm-build bats script
Split rpm-build bats script into Fedora 27 / Fedora 28 (can drop 27 in future if required)

Signed-off-by: pixdrift <support@pixeldrift.net>

comments.body:
A few updates to the rpm CI checks/tests. Have squashed my commits.. should be good to merge.. pending feedback.

Cheers! 😄
Just one change that I'd like reverted, otherwise LGTM.  Thanks for the touch ups here.
@TomSweeneyRedHat, thanks for the catch, all fixed.
